title: chrysosplenium chinense
intro: Chrysosplenium chinense, also known as golden spleenwort or Chinese golden spleenwort, is a type of flowering plant in the family Saxifragaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Chrysosplenium chinense include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and treating various types of infections. Chrysosplenium chinense is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, where it is typically combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
